name: Saffron Extract
summary: Saffron Extract is tracked for May affect serotonergic signaling, antioxidant pathways, and inflammatory mediators with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: Saffron Extract is tracked for May affect serotonergic signaling, antioxidant pathways, and inflammatory mediators with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: GI upset, headache, and dizziness possible; avoid high doses in pregnancy.

sources.title: PubMed PMID 28735826. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.citation: PubMed PMID 28735826. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.note: evidence citation lookup; PMID source present in Evidence_Register

contraindications: Pregnancy or breastfeeding is an absolute contraindication due to uterine-stimulant and abortifacient effects at higher doses
caution with bleeding disorders or anticoagulant or blood-thinning medication use
caution with unbalanced bipolar disorder due to serotonergic activity
avoid high doses above standard extract ranges due to risk of vomiting or kidney toxicity.
